title: Bosmere N256 Garden Care Seed Tray Inserts, 24 Cells, Pack of 5, Black
features: This Bosmere N256 24 cell inserts are designed with individual cells for easy removal of plants
Bosmere's N256 24 cell inserts are ideal for sowing seeds or striking cuttings
These cell inserts come with raised channels to ensure free drainage
description: From the manufacturer GROWERS CHOICE High Quality Garden Products Growers Choice offers comprehensive range of garden sundries, propagation solutions and 100% recycled pots. For serious gardeners, whether indoors or out, Growers Choice offers all the gardening essentials including wire, twine, labels, fixings and growing aids. Discover our collection of ornamental pots and planters , that are made from 100% waste plastic. At Growers Choice, we give you the right tools to create a successful garden, allotment or outdoor space. Why Growers Choice? Huge range of quality products for serious gardeners Large range of sustainable and recyclable product available We cater for indoor and outdoor planting Fast delivery direct from the warehouse Growers Choice offer a range of premium quality propagation pots, trays & accessories which are made from recycled materials and are designed to last for several seasons. Cell Inserts Grow your seedlings in their own cell to reduce the chance of root damage when plants are potted up. Pot Carry Trays High quality plastic trays for planting and carrying your pots. The trays come with a full set of pots in the size required. Propagators Growers Choice propagators are the solution for improving results when propagating seeds at home. PLANT SUPPORTS POTS & PLANTERS GARDENING TOOLS THERMOMETERS & METERS
